query: UPDATE question_bank SET question = REPLACE(question, '> ⚠️ *此题原含几何图形，图形无法在浏览器中显示。/ This problem originally contained a geometric figure which cannot be displayed in the browser.*', '> ⚠️ *This problem originally contained a geometric diagram which has been omitted and cannot be displayed.*') WHERE question LIKE '%此题原含几何图形%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4EMZXV1BE262rJP.02474c5205e2 --database Yac4zPy3BEzfVh9QddoaLw --execute UPDATE question_bank SET question = REPLACE(question, '> ⚠️ *此题原含几何图形，图形无法在浏览器中显示。/ This problem originally contained a geometric figure which cannot be displayed in the browser.*', '> ⚠️ *This problem originally contained a geometric diagram which has been omitted and cannot be displayed.*') WHERE question LIKE '%此题原含几何图形%';
